title: Nice Keep Inventory
description: Keep only Equipment and important items upon death. Also includes a fully fletched Graves system and 3 new enchantments. Fully configurable.
body:
## 📖 Description **Nice Keep Inventory** tweaks the way the keepinventory gamerule works by only keeping part of your inventory when you die. Keeping only important items like Armor and Tools provides a fair compromise between loosing all your stuff and keeping everything. In addition to that this data pack also comes with three new enchantments: Safekeep, Deathlock and Gravehold. Details for both are below. A more comprehensive list including enchantments of all our data packs can be found [here](https://enchantments.explorerseden.eu/).
Deathlock Description: Items lost/Graves created on death can only be obtained by one self~~~~
Applicable to: Chestplates
Loot Source: Enchanting Table, Random Loot, Traded Books, Treasure
Gravehold Description: Items/Graves dropped on death will stay there for double the time before they disappear
Applicable to: Chestplates
Loot Source: Enchanting Table, Random Loot, Traded Books, Treasure
Safekeep Description: Keep all items on death at the cost of 33% item durability
Applicable to: Armor
Loot Source: Enchanting Table, Random Loot, Traded Books, Treasure
With **v2.5** forward the data pack also comes with customizable Player Graves and an easy to use in-game config menu which can be accessed by using the `/function keep_inventory`command. ![config_menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b1691cb950c2d51729bc6b305536ef7aad357f3.png) **The data pack also functions as the resource pack** for the needed translation keys. *(Mod users automatically have the resources enabled)* For **PaperMC users**, it is recommended to set the `paper.maxChatCommandInputSize` property to a value between 512 and 1024. More information can be found in the [PaperMC Docs](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/reference/system-properties/#papermaxchatcommandinputsize). ## 📝 Translations Want to play in your own language? You can help us out by contributing on our **[Crowdin Page](https://crowdin.com/project/explorers-eden)**! Once a translation for a language is finished, it’ll be added to the data pack for you to enjoy. ## ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions We're here to help! If you happen to have questions, suggestions or just encountered a bug, then feel free to hop on our discord server to ask for help in our **Data Pack Section**. [Click to join the server](https://discord.gg/f2pMggfgVv) ## 🎮 Explorer's Eden SMP Join **[A Realm Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/server/a-realm-recrafted)**, our Minecraft SMP! Enjoy a world featuring all of our (actively maintained) data packs, as well as some exclusive ones. It’s completely free without any microtransactions. Come build, explore, and craft with us today!
